title: P-154 GST Implications Relating to the Movement of a Building that Previously Formed Part of a Residential Complex - Canada.ca

## P-154 GST Implications Relating to the Movement of a Building that Previously Formed Part of a Residential Complex

## Notice to the reader
The GST/HST rates referenced in this publication are those that were in effect at the time of publishing. For the list of all applicable GST/HST rates (current and historic), go to GST/HST calculator (and rates) .
